scripts.deploy:baseSepolia: HARDHAT_NETWORK=baseSepolia npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PredictionMarket.ts --network baseSepolia --verify --reset
scripts.deploy:sepolia: HARDHAT_NETWORK=sepolia npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PredictionMarket.ts --network sepolia --verify --reset
scripts.upgrade:baseSepolia: HARDHAT_NETWORK=baseSepolia npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/UpgradePredictionMarket.ts --network baseSepolia --verify
scripts.upgrade:sepolia: HARDHAT_NETWORK=sepolia npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/UpgradePredictionMarket.ts --network sepolia --verify
